history.title: Assessment history
history.error: Failed to load history. Please try again.
history.empty: No assessments yet. Start your first smart assessment.
history.sign_in_required: Sign in to view your history.

toast.logout_success: You have been signed out successfully.
toast.analysis_success: Analysis completed successfully — your results are ready.
toast.analysis_error: Symptom analysis failed. Please try again.
toast.idle_logout: You were signed out due to inactivity.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: View and edit your account information.
profile.sign_in_required: Sign in to view your profile.
profile.password_section_hint: To change your password, fill in the fields below. Otherwise leave them blank.
profile.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to view your history and continue your care.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account to keep your assessment history at hand.

doctor.title: Doctor dashboard
doctor.subtitle: View patients' assessment history by their ID.
doctor.sign_in_required: Sign in to access the doctor dashboard.
doctor.permission_hint: Only authorized doctors can view patient histories.

landing.hero_title: Don't worry about sudden symptoms anymore — we're here for you.
landing.hero_sub: Healthino's smart symptom analysis flags medical urgencies and recommends the right specialist for you.

symptom_form.title: Symptom check
symptom_form.additional_info_placeholder: Additional notes, accompanying symptoms, or anything you think is important…
symptom_form.attachments_hint: Click to choose files or drop them here
symptom_form.attachments_types: Images and PDFs — multiple files supported
symptom_form.submit_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.
symptom_form.red_flag_warning: Warning: emergency symptoms! Please go to the ER immediately.

validation.duration_required: Please enter how many hours the symptoms have lasted.

first_aid.title: Initial care and first aid
first_aid.default_1: Get plenty of rest and avoid heavy activity until you see a doctor.
first_aid.default_2: Drink plenty of fluids and monitor your temperature regularly if you have a fever.
first_aid.default_3: If symptoms worsen or you notice emergency signs (chest pain, severe shortness of breath, loss of consciousness), call emergency services immediately.
